### Picklist Values

**Salutation** (`Salutation`):
- Mr. = `Mr.`
- Ms. = `Ms.`
- Mrs. = `Mrs.`
- Dr. = `Dr.`
- Prof. = `Prof.`
- Rev. = `Rev.`
- Pastor = `Pastor`
- Lady = `Lady`

- Bishop = `Bishop`

**Other Geocode Accuracy** (`OtherGeocodeAccuracy`):
- Address = `Address`
- Near Address = `NearAddress`
- Block = `Block`
- Street = `Street`
- Extended Zip = `ExtendedZip`
- Zip = `Zip`
- Neighborhood = `Neighborhood`
- City = `City`
- County = `County`
- State = `State`
- Unknown = `Unknown`

**Mailing Geocode Accuracy** (`MailingGeocodeAccuracy`):
- Address = `Address`

- Street = `Street`
- Extended Zip = `ExtendedZip`
- Zip = `Zip`
- Neighborhood = `Neighborhood`

- County = `County`
- State = `State`
- Unknown = `Unknown`

**Lead Source** (`LeadSource`):
- Web = `Web`
- Phone Inquiry = `Phone Inquiry`
- Referral = `Referral`
- Faith That Works = `Faith That Works`
- Purchased List = `Purchased List`

**Pronouns** (`Pronouns`):
- He/Him = `He/Him`
- She/Her = `She/Her`
- They/Them = `They/Them`
- He/They = `He/They`
- She/They = `She/They`

**Gender Identity** (`GenderIdentity`):
- Male = `Male`
- Female = `Female`
- Nonbinary = `Nonbinary`
- Not Listed = `Not Listed`

**Preferred Phone** (`npe01__PreferredPhone__c`):
- Home = `Home`
- Work = `Work`
- Mobile = `Mobile`
- Other = `Other`

**Preferred Email** (`npe01__Preferred_Email__c`):
- Personal = `Personal`
- Work = `Work`
- Alternate = `Alternate`

**Primary Address Type** (`npe01__Primary_Address_Type__c`):
- Home = `Home`
- Work = `Work`
- Other = `Other`

**Secondary Address Type** (`npe01__Secondary_Address_Type__c`):
- Home = `Home`
- Work = `Work`
- Other = `Other`

**DEPRECATED - _SYSTEM: ACCOUNT PROCESSOR** (`npe01__SystemAccountProcessor__c`):
- One-to-One = `One-to-One`
- Individual = `Individual`

**Naming Exclusions** (`npo02__Naming_Exclusions__c`):
- Household__c.Name = `Household__c.Name`
- Household__c.Formal_Greeting__c = `Household__c.Formal_Greeting__c`
- Household__c.Informal_Greeting__c = `Household__c.Informal_Greeting__c`

**_SYSTEM: HOUSEHOLD PROCESSOR-DEPRECATED** (`npo02__SystemHouseholdProcessor__c`):
- All Individual Contacts = `All Individual Contacts`
- All New or Edited Contacts = `All New or Edited Contacts`
- No Contacts = `No Contacts`

**Volunteer Availability** (`GW_Volunteers__Volunteer_Availability__c`):
- Weekdays = `Weekdays`
- Weekends = `Weekends`
- Morning = `Morning`

**Recurrence Type** (`RecurrenceType`):
- Recurs Daily = `RecursDaily`
- Recurs Every Weekday = `RecursEveryWeekday`
- Recurs Monthly = `RecursMonthly`
- Recurs Monthly Nth = `RecursMonthlyNth`
- Recurs Weekly = `RecursWeekly`
- Recurs Yearly = `RecursYearly`
- Recurs Yearly Nth = `RecursYearlyNth`

**Recurrence Instance** (`RecurrenceInstance`):
- 1st = `First`
- 2nd = `Second`
- 3rd = `Third`
- 4th = `Fourth`
- last = `Last`

**Recurrence Month of Year** (`RecurrenceMonthOfYear`):
- January = `January`
- February = `February`
- March = `March`
- April = `April`
- May = `May`
- June = `June`
- July = `July`
- August = `August`
- September = `September`
- October = `October`
- November = `November`
- December = `December`

**Event Subtype** (`EventSubtype`):
- Event = `Event`

**Pattern Version** (`Recurrence2PatternVersion`):
- RFC 5545 v4 RRULE = `1`
- RFC 5545 v4_2 RRULE = `2`

**Activity Type** (`Activity_Type__c`):
- Technical Program 1 = `Technical Program 1`
- Technical Program 2 = `Technical Program 2`
- Phone Screen = `Phone Screen`

**Disposition** (`Disposition__c`):
- Left Voice Mail = `Left Voice Mail`
- No Voicemail = `No Voicemail`

### Picklist Values

**Payment Method** (`npe01__Payment_Method__c`):
- Card = `Card`
- Check = `Check`
- ACH = `ACH`
- Donor Advised Fund = `Donor Advised Fund`
- Cash = `Cash`
- PayPal = `PayPal`
- In Kind = `In Kind`
- EFT = `EFT`
- Send Me an Invoice = `Send Me an Invoice`

**Payment Acknowledgment Status** (`npsp__Payment_Acknowledgment_Status__c`):
- To Be Acknowledged = `To Be Acknowledged`
- Acknowledged = `Acknowledged`
- Do Not Acknowledge = `Do Not Acknowledge`

**ACH Code** (`npsp__ACH_Code__c`):
- Prearranged Payment and Deposit Entry (PPD) = `PPD`
- Cash Concentration or Disbursement (CCD) = `CCD`
- Web-initiated Entry (WEB) = `WEB`
- Telephone-initiated Entry (TEL) = `TEL`
- Back Office Conversion (BOC) = `BOC`
- Accounts Receivable Conversion (ARC) = `ARC`

**Debit Type** (`npsp__DebitType__c`):
- Refund = `Refund`
- Partial Refund = `Partial Refund`
- Chargeback = `Chargeback`

### Picklist Values

**Geocode Accuracy** (`GeocodeAccuracy`):
- Address = `Address`
- Near Address = `NearAddress`
- Block = `Block`
- Street = `Street`
- Extended Zip = `ExtendedZip`
- Zip = `Zip`
- Neighborhood = `Neighborhood`
- City = `City`
- County = `County`
- State = `State`
- Unknown = `Unknown`
